MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kimberly A. Bliss of the Office of the City Attorney, 554-3861, appearing for defendant and moving party
Louis Spitters, 408-293-0463, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

The Court made a personal disclosure, and no objections having been raised, the matter was argued.
